scripts.build:runtime-global: pnpm run build && pnpm --filter @kugutu/runtime-web run build:global
scripts.validate:example: pnpm run build && node packages/cli/dist/main.js validate packages/schema/examples/avatar-lite.character.json
scripts.build:example: pnpm run build && node packages/cli/dist/main.js build packages/schema/examples/avatar-lite.character.json --out /tmp/kugutu-avatar-lite.charbundle.json
scripts.build:web-basic: pnpm run sync:web-basic-demo && vite build --config apps/web-basic/vite.config.ts
scripts.build:react-basic: pnpm run sync:web-basic-demo && vite build --config apps/react-basic/vite.config.ts
scripts.build:studio: pnpm run sync:web-basic-demo && vite build --config apps/studio/vite.config.ts
